news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Funds
First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for FT Vest U.S. Equity Buffer & Premium Income ETF - September
First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distribution for Exchange-Traded Funds
First Trust Launches XISE, the First U.S. Buffer ETF Designed to Provide a Level of Income

overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Buffer & Premium Income ETF - September (XISE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a consistent income stream and a buffer against the first 10% of losses over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds a package of SPY FLEX options and US Treasurys. XISE was launched on Sep 15, 2023 and is issued by First Trust.
